description_long: This is a tall, wooden chest of drawers featuring five spacious drawers stacked vertically. The chest is constructed from a medium-brown wood with a visible grain pattern, giving it a classic and sturdy appearance. Each drawer is fitted with two metal bail pull handles, which are symmetrically placed and have a traditional design. The top of the chest has a decorative, scalloped edge, adding a subtle ornamental touch to the otherwise simple form. The legs are short and slightly tapered, providing stability while maintaining a refined silhouette. The back and sides are plain, with the front being the only side featuring handles and drawer seams.
description: A tall, classic wooden chest of drawers with five drawers, metal bail pull handles, and a decorative scalloped top edge.
description_view_0: Front view showing five drawers with metal handles and a scalloped top edge.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the flat, plain wooden panel and the chest's depth.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a plain wooden back with no handles or decorative features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the flat wooden panel.
